source_text: VICKHART, W. A. F.—B. 1888; clk. Crown ents' office, 1906; asst. head, gen. dept., Mar., 2; do., stores dept., July, 1931; dep. head, pping dept., Nov., 1934; asst. sec., W. African tency bd., June, 1914; secy., Dec., 1918.

WN, ALAN O.—B. 1878; ed. "Queen's gram. schl., Walsall, and St. Mark's Chelsea (1st cl. Queen's scholarship); certif. (Bd. of Educ., England); matric. Univ., 1898; asst. mast., diocesan schl., Ong, 1901-1909; jun. asst. mast., Queen's Hong Kong, 1910; lecturer, Tech. Inst., Kong, 1910-1912; headmaster, Wantsai hl., 1913; headmaster, Yaumati schl., admaster, Wantsai schl., 1915; seconded ser., 1917; 2nd lieut., 1917; 1st lieut., rved in France, 1917 to 1919; demobilised, ep. regis., Hong Kong Univ., 1919; ter, Wantsai schl., 1919, headmaster, schl., 1919; asst. mast., cls. II., 1920; Victoria Br. schl., 1920; asst. mast., 1921; headmr., Wantsai schl., 1921; ditto, schl., 1921; asst. mast., Queen's Coll. and schl., 1922; headmr., Wantsai schl., admr., Yaumati schl., 1924-28; dir., tech. 30; inspr., English schls., 1933.

ON, EDWARD TREVOR.—ed. Ruthin Gram. U.C.W., Aberystwyth (B.A.), and Jesus Oxford (B.A.); B. 1886; cadet, Ceylon civ. 5th Nov., 1910; attached to Trincomalee heri, Dec., 1910; ag. pol. mag., Trincom- lay, 1911; ag. pol. mag., Puttalam, May, office asst. to govt. agt., N.W. Prov., Sept., pol. mag., Kurunegala, Aug., 1913; ag. pol. Kandy, Apr., 1916; addtnl. asst. col. sec., 1918; 3rd asst. col. sec., May, 1918; pol. Kandy, Sept., 1920; asst. govt. agt., N. Feb., 1921; ditto, Jaffna, Dec., 1924; dist. Matara, Mar., 1926; asst. govt. agt., tra, May, 1926; ag. govt. agt., Anuradha- Mar., 1928; do., Jaffna, Nov., 1930; offr., grade II, 1932.
C.E.—B. 1900; ed. Dumbarton Acad. and asgow Univ.; engr., P.W.D., Hong Kong, 25.

HYTE-SMITH, THOMAS STODART.—B. ed. Merchiston Castle Schl. and Edinburgh v.; writer to signet, 1906; 2nd lieut., the Royal s, 1915; lieut., 1916; capt., K.A.R., 1918; ed in Nyasaland and Portuguese E. Africa, '19; 2nd asst. crown solr., Hong Kong, Dec., 3; J.P., 1924; asst. crown solr., 1926; ag. ., Kowloon, 1929 and 1930; asst. crown ., 1930; ag. land offr. and regisr., marriages, 4; land offr., 1935.

flagged_value.position: ed in Nyasaland and Portuguese E. Africa
acting land officer and regisr., marriages

source_text: CHAN Yik On.—b. 1914; ed. National Central Univ.; asst. M.O., H.K., 1951; M.O., 1953; senr. med. and health offr., 1959; specialist, 1963.
